heading: Registration as constructive notice of claim of ownership
label: 1072 Registration as constructive notice of claim of ownership
text: Registration of a mark on the principal register provided by this chapter or under the Act of , or the Act of , shall be constructive notice of the registrant’s claim of ownership thereof.March 3, 1881February 20, 1905
